name: Learning Safe Agent Behaviour from Human Preferences and Justifications via World Models
summary: arXiv:2607.13172v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We address the problem of safely training an agent policy and deploying a good and safe policy, in settings where the environment dynamics are unknow...
description: arXiv:2607.13172v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We address the problem of safely training an agent policy and deploying a good and safe policy, in settings where the environment dynamics are unknown and no suitable reward function is available. In the context of safety-critical environments, we consider traditional reinforcement learning impractical and resort to the resource of human input. We...
author: Ilias Kazantzidis, Timothy J. Norman, Yali Du, Christopher T. Freeman
